<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnSettingsPage/CnSettingsPage.vue -->

### Props

| Name               | Type            | Required | Default                                          | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------------------ | --------------- | -------- | ------------------------------------------------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`            | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Settings')`        | Page title.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `description`      | `string`        |          | `''`                                             | Description shown under the title when `showTitle` is set.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `showTitle`        | `boolean`       |          | `false`                                          | Whether to render the inline page header.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `icon`             | `string`        |          | `''`                                             | MDI icon name for the header.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `sections`         | `Array<object>` |          | `[]`                                             | Section definitions (flat shape — back-compat). Each section MUST declare EXACTLY ONE of: - `fields: Array<Field>` (back-compat flat-field body) - `component: <registry-name>` + optional `props` - `widgets: Array<{ type, props?, componentName? }>` Common keys: `{ title, description?, icon?, collapsible?, docUrl? }`. Mutually exclusive with `tabs[]` (XOR — see manifest-settings-orchestration REQ-MSO-1). |
| `tabs`             | `Array<object>` |          | `[]`                                             | Tab definitions (orchestration shape — manifest-settings- orchestration REQ-MSO-2). When set, CnSettingsPage renders a tab strip above the section area; the active tab's `sections[]` flow into the same renderer used by the flat shape. Mutually exclusive with `sections[]`. Each tab MUST be `{ id: string, label: string, icon?: string, sections: array<Section> }`.                                           |
| `initialTab`       | `string`        |          | `''`                                             | Optional ID of the tab to activate on mount. When empty AND `tabs[]` is non-empty, the first tab is active by default. Unknown IDs fall back to the first tab.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `initialValues`    | `object`        |          | `\{\}`                                           | Initial values keyed by `field.key`. Defaults to an empty object; in practice the consumer passes the current IAppConfig snapshot loaded from their settings controller.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `saveEndpoint`     | `string`        |          | `''`                                             | Endpoint that receives the PUT on save. Pass a fully-qualified URL — the library has no knowledge of the consumer's app id. When empty, no PUT is issued and `@save` is emitted with the form data so the consumer can persist it themselves.                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `showSaveBar`      | `boolean`       |          | `true`                                           | Whether to render the built-in save/reset bar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `saveLabel`        | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Save')`            | Label for the save button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `resetLabel`       | `string`        |          | `() =&gt; t('nextcloud-vue', 'Discard changes')` | Label for the reset (discard) button.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| `translate`        | `union`         |          | `null`                                           | Optional translation function. When provided, applied to section titles, field labels, and other i18n-key strings declared in the manifest. Defaults to the identity function.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| `customComponents` | `union`         |          | `null`                                           | Optional explicit custom-component registry. When set, takes precedence over the injected `cnCustomComponents`. Use this when mounting CnSettingsPage outside a CnAppRoot tree (or when test-mounting with a stub registry).                                                                                                                                                                                          |

### Events

| Name           | Payload | Description |
| -------------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `save`         | —       |             |
| `error`        | —       |             |
| `input`        | —       |             |
| `widget-event` | —       |             |
| `tab-change`   | —       |             |

### Slots

| Name                 | Bindings                             | Description |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------ | ----------- |
| `header`             | `title`, `description`, `icon`       |             |
| `actions`            | —                                    |             |
| `field-${field.key}` | `name`, `field`, `value`, `on-input` |             |
